## Checklist

- [ ] `python scripts/verify_all.py` passes locally (or targeted suites + reason)
- [ ] Tests cover the new behavior (fail without the change)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` → `Unreleased` updated for user-visible changes
- [ ] Generated files regenerated, not hand-edited (api-contract, docs/API.md, docs-site mirrors, help pages)
